issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios, such as invalid JSON payloads or timestamp format validation.
The skill is vendor-locked to ClickHouse, limiting compatibility with other analytical databases.

scenarios.name: ClickHouse events table for product analytics
scenarios.rationale: Baseline omits LowCardinality, DateTime64(3), monthly partitioning, ORDER BY (event_name, timestamp), and TTL; treatment uses every documented base field and MergeTree optimization.

scenarios.name: Node.js ingestion service with buffer + health
scenarios.rationale: Baseline does a per-request insert with no batching, no validation, and no /health endpoint; treatment buffers to 1000/2s, validates event_name and timestamp, uses INSERT FORMAT JSONEachRow, retries with backoff to a dead-letter file, and exposes the documented health payload.
